// Models
public sealed class BenchmarkJob
{
    public Guid Id { get; init; }
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double? Score { get; init; }
    public DateTime StartedAt { get; init; }
    public DateTime? CompletedAt { get; init; }
    public string? LogPath { get; init; }
}

public sealed class BenchmarkResult
{
    public Guid JobId { get; init; }
    public double Score { get; init; }
    public TimeSpan Duration { get; init; }
    public string? ErrorMessage { get; init; }
}

// Runner
public sealed class BenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _modelLock = new(1, 1);
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<Guid, BenchmarkJob> _jobs = new();
    private readonly ILogger<BenchmarkRunner> _logger;

    public async Task<BenchmarkResult> RunAsync(BenchmarkContext context)
    {
        var jobId = Guid.NewGuid();
        var job = new BenchmarkJob
        {
            Id = jobId,
            Repository = context.Repository,
            Model = context.Model,
            Constraints = context.Constraints,
            StartedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        };
        _jobs[jobId] = job;

        await _modelLock.WaitAsync();
        try
        {
            var result = await RunSingleJobAsync(job);
            job.Score = result.Score;
            job.CompletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
